_doc: Recurrence-signal patterns scanned against the AI AGENT's OWN output (last assistant message) at session Stop — NOT the user prompt. A match ENFORCES (`sidecar architecture convergence stop-check`, config.convergenceEnforce default ON): the response must carry a `🧬 CONVERGENCE` accounting line or the Stop hook emits decision:block. The AGENT still judges whether it's a real recurrence (→ record into ARCHITECTURE.json `convergence.records[]`, commons root-cause, `🧬 CONVERGENCE 기록: <id>`) or a passing mention / false positive (→ dismiss with `🧬 CONVERGENCE: 해당 없음`). So this is a deliberately WIDE net — precision lives in the agent's judgment (the marker), not the keyword. Plain substrings match literally (case-insensitive). stop_hook_active bounds it to one block per stop-chain (anti-wedge); the marker, once present, consumes that signal PER DISTINCT MATCHED SIGNAL per session, so a broad false positive (e.g. '또' in '또는') does not consume a different real signal later. enforce off → legacy advisory warn. Override per-repo at .harness/convergence-triggers.json.
hint: 재발 신호 — 같은 원인의 결함/실수가 또 보인다(첫 발생이 아니라 재발). 그 학습을 설계 SSOT 한곳에 박아 같은 결함 재도입을 막아라. ① 기존 기록 확인: `sidecar architecture convergence list` ② 추가/갱신(id-keyed upsert): `sidecar architecture convergence add --id <ID> --state ossified --value "<핵심 학습>" --threshold "<재발조건/해결>" --source <원인파일>`. 인라인 @convergence 주석·별도 incident 트래커로 흩지 말 것 (commons root-cause).
